import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state) -> jnp.ndarray:
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position normalized
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32) / (H - 1)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32) / (W - 1)
    
    # Agent direction one-hot
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)  # (4,)
    
    # Pocket info: tile_id and color_id normalized
    pocket_tile = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_pyramid = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 5).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Find blue pyramid location
    PYRAMID_ID = 5
    BLUE_ID = 3
    
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    pyramid_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID_ID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE_ID)
    pyramid_count = jnp.sum(pyramid_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Mean position of blue pyramid (if exists)
    pyramid_mean_y = jnp.sum(yy * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1.0)
    pyramid_mean_x = jnp.sum(xx * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1.0)
    
    pyramid_norm_y = pyramid_mean_y / (H - 1)
    pyramid_norm_x = pyramid_mean_x / (W - 1)
    
    # Relative position from agent to blue pyramid
    rel_y = (pyramid_mean_y - state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) / (H - 1)
    rel_x = (pyramid_mean_x - state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)) / (W - 1)
    
    # Manhattan distance to blue pyramid
    dist = (jnp.abs(pyramid_mean_y - state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)) + 
            jnp.abs(pyramid_mean_x - state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)))
    dist_norm = dist / (H + W - 2)
    
    # Whether pyramid is still on the grid (not picked up)
    pyramid_exists = (pyramid_count > 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Front tile info
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    
    # Is front tile the blue pyramid?
    front_is_blue_pyramid = ((state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID_ID) & 
                              (state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE_ID)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 80.0
    
    # Flattened grid observation (tile_id and color_id for each cell)
    grid_tiles = state.grid[:, :, 0].astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 12.0  # (H*W,)
    grid_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1].astype(jnp.float32).flatten() / 11.0  # (H*W,)
    
    # Combine all features
    scalar_features = jnp.array([
        agent_y, agent_x,
        pocket_tile, pocket_color,
        pocket_empty, holding_pyramid, holding_blue_pyramid,
        pyramid_norm_y, pyramid_norm_x,
        rel_y, rel_x,
        dist_norm,
        pyramid_exists,
        front_tile_id, front_tile_color,
        front_is_blue_pyramid,
        step_norm,
    ], dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        scalar_features,   # 17
        dir_oh,            # 4
        grid_tiles,        # H*W = 81
        grid_colors,       # H*W = 81
    ])
    
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
